ChangeRequest.name: Removing `Default status` and `Past due date` from `Credit facility risk data` entity type
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!-- See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab) -->
### Overview
The attributes `Default status` and `Past due date` in the entity type `Credit facility risk data` refer to the situation where the `Default status` is assessed on an individual level.
We believe that this situation may not apply for individual `Credit facilities` due to its character as an `FinRep`.`Off-balance sheet item`, i.e., no funds have been given to the `Debtor`, only the promise to provide these funds. Based on this characteristic, we question the possibility of a `Credit facility` being individually assessed resulting in `Default because 90/180 days past due` or `Default because unlikely to pay`. It seems that both of these stati are not applicable in this situation where a `Credit facility` is individually assessed.
Given that our argumentation is logically sound, these attributes should be removed accordingly.
### Contact person
dominik.lin-ully@oenb.at, Valentina.Murano@bancaditalia.it
### Description of change request
Remove the attributes `Default status` and `Past due date` from the `Credit facility risk data` entity type.
### Summary of impacted LDM objects/attributes
* `Credit facility risk data`
### Forward Engineering considerations _[Other considerations]_
### Before closing checklist - [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Any other actions to be taken
